worst quality, low quality, score_1, score_2, score_3, artist name,

This image suffers from low resolution and poor quality, appearing pixelated, blurry, and full of compression or jpeg artifacts. 

The scene is cluttered with many small figures, heads, or people in the background that look like chibi characters, dolls, or fumo dolls, surrounding the subject with a large collection of plush toys. 

The artwork looks like a fake anime or game screenshot with noise, errors, and scan lines, resembling something unfinished sketch with a simple, abstract, or monochrome background.

The anatomy is incorrect, featuring bad proportions, bad perspective, and ugly, deformed body parts such as bad hands, bad feet, fused or missing fingers, extra limbs, and twisted or flexible deformities. The image contains four fingers, six fingers, four toes, six toes.

This image contains many of the artist's signatures around the edges, and contains many watermarks, signatures, logos, or censorship bars like mosaics, and has an low-score AI-generated error.

The character in this image has a white area above the eyes, a white forehead, and many lines on the eyelids.
